transcript.final_response: Perfect! Now let me use sed for the extraction:
tool_calls:
cat /config/template.env /config/overrides.txt 2>/dev/null || echo "Files may not exist, let me check..."

# Create /app directory if it doesn't exist
mkdir -p /app

# Create associative arrays to store data
declare -A overrides
declare -A final_values

# Read overrides.txt and populate the overrides array
while IFS='=' read -r key value; do
    # Skip empty lines
    [[ -z "$key" ]] && continue
    overrides["$key"]="$value"
done < /config/overrides.txt

# Read template.env and process each line
while IFS= read -r line; do
    # Skip empty lines and comments
    [[ -z "$line" || "$line" =~ ^# ]] && continue
    
    # Extract KEY from KEY=${VALUE:-default}
    key="${line%%=*}"
    
    # Extract the default value using parameter expansion pattern
    # Matches: ${VARNAME:-default}
    if [[ "$line" =~ \$\{[^:]*:-([^}]*)\} ]]; then
        default="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
    else
        default=""
    fi
    
    # Check if override exists, otherwise use default
    if [[ -n "${overrides[$key]}" ]]; then
        final_values["$key"]="${overrides[$key]}"
    else
        final_values["$key"]="$default"
    fi
done < /config/template.env

# Write to /app/.env
: > /app/.env  # Clear the file

for key in "${!final_values[@]}"; do
    echo "$key=${final_values[$key]}" >> /app/.env
done

# Sort for consistent output
sort /app/.env -o /app/.env

# Print the result
echo "=== Final /app/.env ==="
cat /app/.env

# Create /app directory if it doesn't exist
mkdir -p /app

# Create associative arrays to store data
declare -A overrides
declare -A final_values

# Read overrides.txt and populate the overrides array
while IFS='=' read -r key value; do
    # Skip empty lines
    [[ -z "$key" ]] && continue
    overrides["$key"]="$value"
done < /config/overrides.txt

while IFS= read -r line; do
    # Skip empty lines and comments
    if [[ -z "$line" ]] || [[ "$line" =~ ^# ]]; then
        continue
    fi
    
    # Extract KEY from KEY=${VALUE:-default}
    key="${line%%=*}"

    # Matches: ${VARNAME:-default}
    if [[ "$line" =~ \$\{[^:]*:-([^}]*)\} ]]; then
        default="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
    else
        default=""
    fi
    
    # Check if override exists, otherwise use default
    if [[ -n "${overrides[$key]}" ]]; then
        final_values["$key"]="${overrides[$key]}"
    else

    fi
done < /config/template.env

# Write to /app/.env
: > /app/.env  # Clear the file

for key in "${!final_values[@]}"; do
    echo "$key=${final_values[$key]}" >> /app/.env
done

# Sort for consistent output
sort /app/.env -o /app/.env

# Print the result
echo "=== Final /app/.env ==="
cat /app/.env

# Debug: check the overrides file
echo "=== Content of overrides.txt ==="
cat /config/overrides.txt
echo ""

# Read overrides.txt more carefully
declare -A overrides

while read -r line; do
    if [[ -z "$line" ]]; then
        continue
    fi
    key="${line%%=*}"
    value="${line#*=}"
    echo "Override: key='$key' value='$value'"
    overrides["$key"]="$value"
done < /config/overrides.txt

echo ""
echo "=== Stored overrides ==="
for k in "${!overrides[@]}"; do
    echo "$k = ${overrides[$k]}"
done

# Create /app directory if it doesn't exist
mkdir -p /app

# Create associative arrays to store data
declare -A overrides
declare -A final_values

# Read overrides.txt
while read -r line; do
    [[ -z "$line" ]] && continue
    key="${line%%=*}"
    value="${line#*=}"
    overrides["$key"]="$value"
done < /config/overrides.txt

echo "=== Processing template.env ==="

# Read template.env and process each line
while read -r line; do
    # Skip empty lines and comments
    [[ -z "$line" ]] && continue
    [[ "$line" =~ ^# ]] && continue
    
    # Extract KEY from KEY=${VALUE:-default}
    key="${line%%=*}"
    
    # Extract the default value using parameter expansion pattern
    # Matches: ${VARNAME:-default}
    default=""
    if [[ "$line" =~ \$\{[^:]*:-([^}]*)\} ]]; then
        default="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
    fi
    
    echo "Template line: $line"
    echo "  Key: $key, Default: $default"
    
    # Check if override exists, otherwise use default
    if [[ -v overrides[$key] ]]; then
        final_values["$key"]="${overrides[$key]}"
        echo "  Using override: ${overrides[$key]}"
    else
        final_values["$key"]="$default"
        echo "  Using default: $default"
    fi
done < /config/template.env

echo ""
echo "=== Final /app/.env ==="

# Clear the file
> /app/.env

# Write to /app/.env in sorted order
for key in $(printf '%s\n' "${!final_values[@]}" | sort); do
    echo "$key=${final_values[$key]}" | tee -a /app/.env
done
bash --version | head -3

mkdir -p /app

# Create temporary files for processing
TMP_OVERRIDES=$(mktemp)
TMP_TEMPLATE=$(mktemp)
TMP_FINAL=$(mktemp)

# Copy files to temp
cp /config/overrides.txt "$TMP_OVERRIDES"
cp /config/template.env "$TMP_TEMPLATE"

# Create a simple awk/shell script to process
cat > /tmp/process.sh << 'SCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash

# Read overrides into variables
declare -A overrides
while read -r line; do
    [ -z "$line" ] && continue
    key="${line%%=*}"
    value="${line#*=}"
    overrides["$key"]="$value"
done < /config/overrides.txt

# Process template
while read -r line; do
    [ -z "$line" ] && continue
    [ "${line:0:1}" = "#" ] && continue
    
    # Extract key (everything before first =)
    key="${line%%=*}"
    
    # Extract default value
    # Line format: KEY=${KEY:-default}
    # Extract what's between ${ and }
    remainder="${line#*\${}"
    remainder="${remainder%\}}"
    
    # Get part after :-
    default="${remainder#*:-}"
    
    # Use override if exists, else use default
    if [ -n "${overrides[$key]}" ]; then
        echo "$key=${overrides[$key]}"
    else
        echo "$key=$default"
    fi
done < /config/template.env | sort > /app/.env

echo "=== Final /app/.env ==="
cat /app/.env
SCRIPT

bash /tmp/process.sh

mkdir -p /app

cat > /tmp/process.sh << 'SCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash

# Read overrides into an associative array
declare -A overrides
while IFS='=' read -r key value; do
    [ -z "$key" ] && continue
    overrides["$key"]="$value"
done < /config/overrides.txt

# Process template
while IFS= read -r line; do
    [ -z "$line" ] && continue
    [ "${line:0:1}" = "#" ] && continue
    
    # Extract key (everything before first =)
    key="${line%%=*}"
    
    # Extract default value from ${KEY:-default} pattern
    # First, remove everything before :- 
    temp="${line#*:-}"
    # Then remove the closing brace
    default="${temp%\}}"
    
    # Use override if exists, else use default
    if [ -n "${overrides[$key]}" ]; then
        echo "$key=${overrides[$key]}"
    else
        echo "$key=$default"
    fi
done < /config/template.env | sort > /app/.env

echo "=== Final /app/.env ==="
cat /app/.env
SCRIPT

bash /tmp/process.sh

mkdir -p /app

# Test the extraction logic first
echo "=== Testing default value extraction ==="
line='DB_NAME=${DB_NAME:-myapp}'
echo "Original: $line"

# Use sed to extract the default
default=$(echo "$line" | sed 's/.*:-\([^}]*\).*/\1/')
echo "Extracted default: $default"

mkdir -p /app

cat > /tmp/process.sh << 'SCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash

# Read overrides into an associative array
declare -A overrides
while IFS='=' read -r key value; do

done < /config/overrides.txt

    # Extract key (everything before first =)
    key="${line%%=*}"

    # Use override if exists, else use default
    if [ -n "${overrides[$key]}" ]; then
        echo "$key=${overrides[$key]}"
    else
        echo "$key=$default"
    fi
done < /config/template.env | sort > /app/.env

echo "=== Final /app/.env ==="
cat /app/.env
SCRIPT

bash /tmp/process.sh
